questions.q: Which luxury automaker admitted on April 24, 2026, that its Middle East deliveries are at a 'complete standstill' due to regional geopolitical disruptions affecting shipping routes?
In an internal memo reported on April 24, 2026, Xbox leadership admitted that players are frustrated and that their presence on which platform 'isn't strong enough'?
According to reports circulating on April 24, 2026, Microsoft is offering its first-ever voluntary buyout program to U.S. employees whose combined age and years of service equal at least what number?
Procter & Gamble reported a six percent increase in diluted net earnings per share on April 24, 2026, driven by a gain from the dissolution of which joint venture business?
